eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 12:11 PM ON FEB 2, 2026 Effective until 08:11 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Pima County, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Pima County Sheriff's Office has requested a Safe Alert for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie. She is described as a white female, 5 feet 4 inches tall, 150 pounds, with brown hair and blue eyes. At approximately 12:15 on 02/01/2026, family was alerted that Nancy had not shown up for church. Family went to her residence and Nancy was not in the home. All her personal belongings, to include her wallet, cell phone and vehicle were still there, but she was nowhere to be found. Nancy suffers from limited mobility, and her medications she needs daily are still in the home. PCSD was contacted and after extensive searching, she has not yet been located.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
